summary: Payroll module frontend testing complete. Admin payroll dashboard fully functional. Accountant workspace not tested (SQL migration not run - expected). Critical infrastructure bug fixed: Next.js cross-origin blocking of static chunks prevented login from working in automated tests.

minor.issue: payroll_entries table not found: '[getPayrollEntries] Could not find the table public.payroll_entries in the schema cache' — SQL migration needs to be run in Supabase Studio

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test — accountant@zamototomotv.com account doesn't exist yet (SQL migration required). Expected per test context.

infrastructure_bug_fixed.issue: Next.js dev mode cross-origin blocking: _next/static/chunks/app-pages-internals.js returned 404 for external origin. Login page JS could not load, form was non-functional.
infrastructure_bug_fixed.root_cause: next.config.ts missing allowedDevOrigins for external preview URLs. Also missing page.js (non-hashed) symlinks for login and main-app chunks.
infrastructure_bug_fixed.fix_applied: Added allowedDevOrigins to next.config.ts, copied page-hash.js to page.js for login and main-app chunks, restarted frontend.

action_items: Run SQL migration (supabase/migrations/20260402_accounting_module.sql + payroll_entries table) in Supabase Studio to enable accountant tests
After migration: test accountant login, sidebar shows /accounting/workspace/payroll, form submission, net amount auto-compute in browser
NOTE: allowedDevOrigins fix is critical for all future deployments — this was preventing login in automated tests
critical_code_review_comments: AccountantPayrollWorkspaceClient.tsx not fully reviewed — should verify form layout (form left, table right) and delete pending entries functionality
PayrollSummaryCard.tsx not viewed but used correctly in AdminPayrollClient
page.tsx (admin) correctly handles accountant redirect and non-admin redirect
page.tsx (accountant workspace) correctly handles admin redirect and non-accountant redirect
GOOD: All modal actions (approve/reject/markPaid) use optimistic UI and router.refresh()
GOOD: Form validation prevents gross=0, deductions<0 submissions

success_rate.frontend: 85% (admin payroll fully tested, accountant workspace blocked by missing DB migration)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin payroll dashboard fully tested and working. Infrastructure fix applied: added allowedDevOrigins to next.config.ts. Accountant workspace (/accounting/workspace/payroll) could not be tested as accountant account doesn't exist (SQL migration required). To test accountant flow: 1) Run SQL migration, 2) Verify accountant login works, 3) Check sidebar shows /accounting/workspace/payroll, 4) Test form submission and net amount computation.

rca_of_infrastructure_issue.issue: Login form non-functional in Playwright browser tests
rca_of_infrastructure_issue.root_cause: Next.js dev server (next dev) blocks cross-origin requests to _next/* resources. External preview URL (media-ops-desk.preview.emergentagent.com) is different origin from localhost:3000. The JS chunk app-pages-internals.js was blocked, preventing React hydration of the login form.
rca_of_infrastructure_issue.reproduction: Access /login from external URL → JS chunks return 404 → React doesn't hydrate → form falls back to native GET (no-op for SPA login)
